name: ETW Logging Disabled In .NET Processes - Registry
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: ETW Logging Disabled In .NET Processes - Registry
SIGMA Description: Potential adversaries stopping ETW providers recording loaded .NET assemblies.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4657 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\.netframework' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%etwenabled%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%newvalue%0%') OR ("Event ID"=4657 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\environment%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%complus_etwenabled%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%complus_etwflags%') AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%newvalue%0%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY ETW Logging Disabled In .NET Processes - Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4657 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\.netframework' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%etwenabled%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%newvalue%0%') OR ("Event ID"=4657 AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\environment%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%complus_etwenabled%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%complus_etwflags%') AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%newvalue%0%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: ETW Logging Disabled In .NET Processes - Registry

False positives: - Unknown  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
